title: Maximum Number of Moves in a Grid
titleCn: 矩阵中移动的最大次数

testcases.input: grid = [[2,4,3,5],[5,4,9,3],[3,4,2,11],[10,9,13,15]] Output: 3 Explanation: We can start at the cell (0, 0) and make the following moves: - (0, 0) -> (0, 1). - (0, 1) -> (1, 2). - (1, 2) -> (2, 3). It can be shown that it is the maximum number of moves that can be made.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We can start at the cell (0, 0) and make the following moves: - (0, 0) -> (0, 1). - (0, 1) -> (1, 2). - (1, 2) -> (2, 3). It can be shown that it is the maximum number of moves that can be made.

testcases.input: grid = [[3,2,4],[2,1,9],[1,1,7]] Output: 0 Explanation: Starting from any cell in the first column we cannot perform any moves.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Starting from any cell in the first column we cannot perform any moves.
